events.title: The Turing Machine
events.short: Alan Turing theorizes a machine that can compute anything.

events.title: The Transistor
events.short: Bell Labs invents the transistor, replacing vacuum tubes.

events.title: Manchester Baby
events.short: The world's first stored-program computer runs its first program.

events.title: The First Digital Image
events.short: Russell Kirsch scans the first digital photograph, the pixel is born.

events.title: The Microprocessor
events.short: Intel releases the 4004, the first CPU on a single chip.

events.title: CHIP-8 & Personal Computing
events.short: CHIP-8 is created, bringing programming to hobbyist computers.
